title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Remake Now Available, with Mixed Reviews Over Early Access Lock
summary: The long-awaited remaster of Bungie's classic hits consoles and PC, spawning a slew of reviews and guides, though the handling of early access on Xbox stirs controversy.

title: Microsoft Tests Cloud Game Streaming with Advertisements on Xbox
summary: The company implements a new business model that allows free gaming in exchange for watching ads, sparking debate among the gaming community.

title: Zach Cregger's New Resident Evil Movie Trailer Amazes Critics and Fans
summary: First footage of the cinematic reboot shows direct connections to the games and a promising atmosphere surpassing previous adaptations.

title: European Commission Approves Saudi Arabia's $55 Billion Purchase of Electronic Arts
summary: The largest leveraged buyout in history gets the green light after no competition concerns were found in the video game market.

title: Amazon Doubles Down on Gaming with Luna, James Bond, and Batman: Caped Crusader
summary: The company clarifies its gaming strategy by integrating the cloud and expanding its studio, while denying plans to pull 007 from IO Interactive.

title: Bethesda Union Denounces Illegal Practices and Minimum Payouts After Massive Xbox Layoffs
summary: Laid-off workers from Bethesda studios receive minimum severance while the union promises to fight labor violations in Canada.

title: Avatar Shows New Series Seven Havens and Delays Fighting Game on Xbox
summary: The expanded Avatar universe previews the upcoming animated series at Comic Con while the video game suffers a last-minute delay on Microsoft's console.

title: Farewell to PlayStation Discs Divides Industry as Experts Warn of Million-Dollar Losses
summary: Ubisoft executives and analysts debate the impact of eliminating physical media on PlayStation, with clashing views on the market's future.

title: Miyamoto Defends Nintendo Remakes and Criticizes Short-Term Profit Prioritization in the Industry
summary: The legendary creator discusses the production of remakes, his future as a director, and how the Mario Galaxy movie spurred new Star Fox and Yoshi games.

title: Insomniac Reveals Cinematic Trailer for Marvel's Wolverine, Actor Shares His Biggest Performance Fear
summary: The anticipated superhero title showcases its story and character design, generating mixed reactions among fans due to the absence of the classic mask.

title: Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World Reveals Details of Its Combat and Synthesis System
summary: The new entry in the spin-off series showcases its peculiar monsters and mechanics in new images and information.

title: Xenoblade Chronicles 2: Switch 2 Edition Shows New Outfits and Return of Merc Assault
summary: Nintendo releases a detailed trailer for the enhanced version on its new console, featuring additional content and visual improvements.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket Launches Ruler of the Skies Expansion Featuring Mega Rayquaza
summary: The new update for the collectible card game incorporates powerful cards from the Hoenn region and new gameplay mechanics.

title: EA Sports FC 27 Confirms $150 Ultimate Edition and Historic Open-World Mode
summary: The soccer simulator announces an ambitious Ultimate Plus edition and revolutionizes its formula by including an open world for the first time in the series.

title: Former Disney CEO Michael Eisner Doesn't Remember Approving Kingdom Hearts Crossover
summary: A surprising revelation about the origins of the successful collaboration between Disney and Square Enix comes to light in new interviews.

title: GSC Game World Denies Founder's Claims About Xbox Payment for Stalker 2 Exclusivity
summary: The current studio contradicts the original founder's statements and asserts that the figures revealed about the exclusivity agreement are not accurate.

title: Former PlayStation Boss Shawn Layden Proposes Return of Double-A Game Development
summary: The veteran executive advocates for a return to mid-budget projects to revitalize the industry and foster creativity.

title: Spanish Studio Crisol Closes After Launch of Its Spanish Resident Evil, Lays Off Entire Staff
summary: The independent studio fails to overcome financial difficulties and announces its closure less than six months after launching its first major title.

title: Batman: Caped Crusader – Chronicles Announced, a Mystery Game Exclusive to Amazon Luna
summary: The new Dark Knight title arrives by surprise as a crime-solving party adventure on Amazon's cloud gaming platform.

title: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Promises to Be an Extreme Immersive Experience in 4DX Theaters
summary: Matt Damon reveals details of his participation in Nolan's epic project while early rumors point to an unprecedented sensory experience.

title: PlayStation Releases New PS5 Firmware Update That Improves Readability
summary: Sony continues optimizing the user experience on its next-generation console with accessibility and performance features.

title: Rockstar Games Workers Union Gains Strength, Holds Positive Meetings with Management
summary: The labor organization at the GTA 6 studio reaches its highest membership and takes significant steps toward mandatory recognition by the company.

title: Star Wars Zero Company Reveals Its Cast, Confirms No New Game+ or Official Mod Support
summary: Bit Reactor's new tactical game shapes up to be a 30-40 hour linear experience with permanent character decisions.

title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls Debuts Its Opening Cinematic, Announces Phoenix Cyclops as DLC
summary: The anime-style fighting game celebrates its launch with a spectacular animated sequence and new downloadable content.
